name: @panda-chat-widget/basic-html

scripts.build: rm -rf vendor widget-dist dist && mkdir -p vendor widget-dist dist/vendor && cp ../../packages/loader/dist/panda-chat-widget-loader.js vendor/panda-chat-widget-loader.js && cp ../../packages/loader/dist/index.js vendor/index.js && cp ../../packages/loader/dist/panda-chat-widget-loader.js dist/vendor/panda-chat-widget-loader.js && cp ../../packages/loader/dist/index.js dist/vendor/index.js && cp -R ../../apps/widget-ui/dist/. widget-dist/ && cp index.html dist/index.html && cp esm.html dist/esm.html

description: Owns the basic HTML host-page demo for local widget testing.
